events.payload:
**Arc**: The AI had just finished building the LLM bundle generation script, the copy-link UI component on the homepage, and confirmed the full e2e flow in the browser. The AI started a dev server at the user's invitation and provided access URLs.

**Before**: The AI was reporting that the dev server was up and providing instructions: listing the URLs to visit, where the button would be found, and noting "玩好了告诉我，我把 dev server 停掉。" — no decision point was exposed.

**Event (preceding AI turn — verbatim)**: "起来了。

- 首页 ZH：http://127.0.0.1:4321/advanced-agentic-dev-patterns/zh/
- 首页 EN：http://127.0.0.1:4321/advanced-agentic-dev-patterns/en/
- 滚到「致非人类读者 / For Non-Human Readers」那段，按钮在标题右端
- 复制后可以直接访问：http://127.0.0.1:4321/advanced-agentic-dev-patterns/llms-mental-models-zh.txt

玩好了告诉我，我把 dev server 停掉。"

**Event (user direction — verbatim)**: "[Image #2] 编码似乎有问题哦"

**Event classification**: user-initiated-pivot

**After — concrete artifacts**: AI diagnosed the charset issue (browser using Latin-1 on bare `text/plain`) and edited `site/scripts/build-llm-bundle.mjs` to prepend a UTF-8 BOM (`\uFEFF`) to both bundle files. Regenerated bundles confirmed with `xxd`: `ef bb bf` at offset 0. Dev server confirmed serving the BOM-prefixed files.

**Why this satisfies the criteria**: The AI was purely narrating/reporting (dev server ready, here are the URLs) with no decision point; the user unprompted introduced a new defect concern (garbled encoding); within the next 8 turns the AI diagnosed the root cause and modified `build-llm-bundle.mjs` to fix it.

**Arc**: The AI had just fixed the UTF-8 BOM encoding issue and confirmed the dev server was serving the corrected bundle. The AI was wrapping up that fix.

**Before**: The AI reported the BOM fix was complete: "BOM 已经在文件头（`EF BB BF`）。dev server 自动重载，刷新浏览器就能看到正确的中文了。" followed by a URL. No decision point, no question, no options offered.

**Event (preceding AI turn — verbatim)**: "BOM 已经在文件头（`EF BB BF`）。dev server 自动重载，刷新浏览器就能看到正确的中文了。

http://127.0.0.1:4321/advanced-agentic-dev-patterns/llms-mental-models-zh.txt"

**Event (user direction — verbatim)**: "好像你把连接地址写死了吗？？  这个地址也不对呀？"

**Event classification**: user-initiated-pivot

**After — concrete artifacts**: AI investigated `astro.config.mjs` (found `site: 'https://nanxingw.github.io'`), discovered bundle URLs were absolute with a baked-in wrong host. Edited `site/scripts/build-llm-bundle.mjs` twice (T297, T299) to strip hardcoded host and emit path-only URLs (e.g. `/advanced-agentic-dev-patterns/zh/mm/orthogonality`). Added a "Resolving URLs" preamble block explaining to LLMs how to reconstruct absolute URLs. Regenerated both bundle files and verified no hardcoded host remained.

**Why this satisfies the criteria**: The AI's preceding turn was a status report with no question or options; the user unprompted identified a new correctness issue (hardcoded wrong URL); within the next ~30 turns the AI rewrote the URL-generation logic in `build-llm-bundle.mjs` and regenerated both `.txt` output files.

**Arc**: The AI had just fixed the hardcoded URL issue in `astro.config.mjs` and verified no remaining `nanxingw.github.io` references existed. The AI was reporting the outcome of that cleanup.

**Before**: The AI reported: "没有其他 `nanxingw.github.io` 引用了。`site/astro.config.mjs` 改成 `https://panqiwei.github.io` 后，Astro 生成的 sitemap、canonical link 等都会用对的 host。dev server 会自动重启 pick up 这个改动。" — pure status report, no question, no options.

**Event (preceding AI turn — verbatim)**: "没有其他 `nanxingw.github.io` 引用了。`site/astro.config.mjs` 改成 `https://panqiwei.github.io` 后，Astro 生成的 sitemap、canonical link 等都会用对的 host。dev server 会自动重启 pick up 这个改动。"

**Event (user direction — verbatim)**: "那你 pr 吧"

**Event classification**: user-initiated-pivot

**After — concrete artifacts**: AI stopped the dev server, ran `git checkout -b feat/llm-mental-models-bundle`, staged 6 files (`site/.gitignore`, `site/astro.config.mjs`, `site/package.json`, `site/scripts/build-llm-bundle.mjs`, `site/src/components/CopyLLMLink.astro`, `site/src/components/HomeStory.astro`), committed (commit `42b874c`), pushed branch to `origin`, and created PR #4 at `pandazki/advanced-agentic-dev-patterns`.

**Why this satisfies the criteria**: The AI's preceding turn was a completion report with no question or fork; the user unprompted introduced a new phase of work (open a pull request); within 17 turns the AI had created a new branch, committed all feature files, pushed, and opened a PR.

**Arc**: The AI had just created PR #4 against `pandazki/advanced-agentic-dev-patterns` (the user's own fork) and reported the URL.

**Before**: The AI reported: "PR 已创建：https://github.com/pandazki/advanced-agentic-dev-patterns/pull/4" — a pure result report with no question or options.

**Event (preceding AI turn — verbatim)**: "PR 已创建：https://github.com/pandazki/advanced-agentic-dev-patterns/pull/4"

**Event (user direction — verbatim)**: "哦 对了。。pr 到 upstream 啊。。"

**Event classification**: user-initiated-pivot

**After — concrete artifacts**: AI closed PR #4 on the fork with a comment, fetched upstream, confirmed `upstream/main` and `origin/main` were at the same commit (`71e8692`), then attempted `gh pr create --repo PanQiWei/advanced-agentic-dev-patterns` targeting `pandazki:feat/llm-mental-models-bundle`. The command errored revealing PR #16 had already been created at `PanQiWei/advanced-agentic-dev-patterns/pull/16`. (The prior rejected tool use at T345 had in fact succeeded.)

**Why this satisfies the criteria**: The AI's preceding turn was a completion report; the user unprompted introduced a correction to the target repository for the PR (fork vs. upstream); within the next 16 turns the AI closed the fork PR and opened the upstream PR at `PanQiWei/advanced-agentic-dev-patterns`.
